config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				check whether user is authenticated if not return to login poge
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsDeviceConfigurationAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Device Configuration"
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Device'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Device')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Device')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Closing/Opening view based on row Selection.	
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block

		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
		messageType = 'devicePanel'   
		#Refresh Edit Panel on Row Selection
		headerLabel = "Edit"
		Action = "Update"
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.data
		for data in	selectedRow:
			DeviceType = data['MST_DeviceType_Id']
			IsActive = data['IsActive']
			Port = data['Port']	
			UnitName = data['UnitName']
			UnitDescription = data['UnitDescription']
			AttachedTo = data['MST_WorkStation_Id']
			Id = data['Id']
			IPAddress = data['IPAddress']
			AssetNumber = data['AssetNumber']
			DeviceSerialNumber = data['DeviceSerialNumber']
			DeviceMapId = data['DeviceMapId']
			break
			
		if IsActive:
			IsActive = 1
		else:
			IsActive = 0
		
		payload = {
		'headerLabel':headerLabel,
		'UnitName': UnitName,
		'UnitDescription':UnitDescription,
		'AttachedTo':[AttachedTo],
		'DeviceType':DeviceType,
		'AssetNumber':AssetNumber,
		'DeviceSerialNumber':DeviceSerialNumber,
		'IPAddress':IPAddress,
		'IsActive':IsActive,
		'Port':Port,
		'Action':Action
		}
		folderName = 'Project_VECV/Device'
		colName = 'Id'
		self.session.custom.selectedDeviceId = Id
		self.session.custom.DeviceMapId = DeviceMapId
		#message handler to parse into add/edit panel
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )	
		#enable edit/delete button
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(Id),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Device'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Device')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/cntBody/tblDevice')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print(str(description) + '  ' + str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Row deselection based on Payload Received.
	"""	
	try:		

		self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']
	except:
		screenName ='Device'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Device')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:tableRow -> cntBody/tblDevice')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: For Table Refresh and Row deselection.
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
			
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		#Refresh data on Add Panel
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'devicePanel'   				
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'UnitName':'','UnitDescription':'','AttachedTo':-1,'DeviceType':-1,'AssetNumber':'','DeviceSerialNumber':'','IPAddress':'','Port':'','IsActive':1,'Action':'Save'}
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Device'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Device')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:tableRefresh -> cntBody/tblDevice')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: for deselect row selection and refreshing add/edit panel	
	"""	
	try:
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblDevice").props.selection.selectedRow = -1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblDevice").props.selection.selectedColumn = ''
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")  
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		#message handler to refresh Add Panel
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'devicePanel'
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'UnitName':'','UnitDescription':'','UnitLabelTo':-1,'WorkStationType':-1,'IPAddress':'','AssetNumber':'','DeviceSerialNumber':'','AttachedTo': -1}		 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	except:
		screenName ='Device'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Device')  
		errorFunction = str('onRoot-> cntBody/tblDevice')  
		errorType=str('Application') 
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
